privileged_info_for_vlm: Target tag: 'short-read'. Page limit: <= 5 pages. Ground truth papers that MUST be tagged: 1) 'A Note on Two Problems in Connexion with Graphs' (3 pages), 2) 'Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids: A Structure for Deoxyribose Nucleic Acid' (2 pages), 3) 'A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes' (4 pages). Distractor paper that MUST NOT be tagged: 'Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search' (6 pages).
